title: Make the PERFECT Videos with Claude Code (Full Workflow)
summary: Cole Medin demonstrates an end-to-end AI video generation workflow powered by Claude Code that automates planning, coding, voice, visuals, music, and production from a single idea or URL input. The system uses Archon as the workflow orchestration harness and HyperFrames as the video generation framework to produce finished videos in minutes without requiring separate editors, animators, or voice actors.
